summary: Comprehensive testing of SnapRoad new features: Admin Dashboard AI Moderation tab, Figma Users tab, theme toggle; Partner Dashboard Credits & Finance, Referrals, Plan & Pricing tabs; backend Supabase endpoints. All 11 backend tests passed. All 7 frontend feature areas passed.

issues: Page subtitle shows generic 'Manage your SnapRoad offers and track performance' instead of Plans & Pricing-specific subtitle - minor UX inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: Admin Dashboard AI Moderation: approve/reject actions work correctly and update incident status/counts in real-time. Confidence threshold slider updates displayed incidents correctly.
Admin Dashboard Figma Users Tab: search filtering works (single result for 'Sarah'), export button opens ExportModal, all 6 mock users displayed in table.
Partner Dashboard Credits & Finance: Credit balance shows 225, 6-month bar chart renders, 5 activity items, 3 earn opportunities all present.
Partner Dashboard Referrals: Copy link button shows 'Copied!' state after click (with 2-second timeout reset), 3 tiers visible, leaderboard renders.

Partner Dashboard Plan & Pricing: 3 cards render correctly (Local $49, Growth $149, Enterprise Custom). Growth card has 'Most Popular' badge. Current plan shows 'Current Plan' button, others show upgrade CTAs.
Backend /api/admin/supabase/status: connected=True, Supabase auth is live and working.
Backend /api/admin/users: Falls back to mock data (source='mock') since Supabase 'users' table not yet migrated - returns correct mock user list.
Auth route: Supabase-first auth working - driver/partner/admin logins succeed (with Supabase or mock fallback).
Theme toggle in Admin Dashboard profile section: correctly toggles between dark/light modes (Moon/Sun icon swaps).

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new features render and function correctly

seed_data_creation: No test data created - using existing mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from this iteration are fully functional. Backend Supabase is connected (connected=True with auth_users available). Admin /api/admin/users returns mock data since Supabase users table migration hasn't been run yet. Admin Dashboard: skip onboarding modal with data-testid='skip-tour-btn'. Partner Dashboard: skip 'Welcome to Partner Portal' modal with button text 'Skip'. Both dashboards have sidebar with data-testid nav items (nav-finance, nav-referrals, nav-pricing for partner; nav-aiModeration, nav-users for admin).
mocked_api_note: MOCKED: /api/admin/users returns source='mock' (from mock_data.py users_db). Supabase Auth is live (connected=True) but users table migration not yet run so user list falls back to mock.
